'''''Star Wars: The Official Magazine'' 6''' was the 6th issue of the ''[[Star Wars: The Official Magazine]]'', covering [[February]] and [[March]] [[1997]] and containing 66 pages.

==Contents==
===Departments===
*[[Feel the Force]]
*Readers' Survey Results
*[[Jawa's Corner|Jawas' Corner]]
*Q&A
*[[Comlink (department)|Comlink]]

===Features===
*"[[The X-wing Files]]" {{C|by [[Jim Swallow]]}}
*:<small>An exhaustive guide to one of the most distinctive vehicles in the Star Wars universe.</small>
*"[[The Making of Star Wars (feature)|The Making of ''Star Wars'']]: Not to be Traveled Lightly" {{C|by [[Dan Abnett]]}}
*:<small>[[March]] [[1976]] – the unforgiving climate of [[Wikipedia:Tunisia|Tunisia]] presents the cast and crew of Star Wars with serious difficulties.</small>
*"[[Star Wars Cinematographer: An Interview with Gil Taylor|Taylor Made]]" {{C|from [[Star Wars Insider 31|''Star Wars Insider'' 31]]}}
*[[Anthony Daniels' Set Diary]]: Germans, Glue and Greebles
*:<small>[[Anthony Daniels]] continues his exclusive memoirs.</small>
*Play-acting
*:<small>Everything you always wanted to know about the Star Wars roleplaying game, but were too confused to ask…</small>
*"[[This Crumb for Hire]]"
*Model Universe
*:<small>From the National Model and Hobby Show in [[Wikipedia:Chicago|Chicago]].</small>
